raw_consumer_statement: XXXX XXXX Services came to my home on XX/XX/XXXX for a service appointment. And they sold me a contract for future service in the amount {$450.00}. I called them and cancelled the service agreement and they informed i will get the full refund of {$450.00}. But i also put a dispute on my card and XXXX XXXX XXXX refunded only {$210.00} on XX/XX/XXXX. But they agreed to refund the full amount i called twice including today and was informed that i was supposed to get the refund. But Citi closed this saying customer is responsible. Citi should be following up on this to get my money
